source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/07_(CYAN) GT1717C, GT1717CP/91_인증 - 국내/02. G series + CYAN/1. 신청시 제출본/03 기술문서 심사에 관한 자료/03 제품의 성능 및 안전을 확인하기 위한 자료 (Rev)/04 성능에 관한 자료 (Rev)/1. [G series] 성능시험성적서 (A-PTR-BLU).docx

document.title: 성능 시험 성적서 / Performance Test Report

sourceSummary.oneLine: Performance test report for G series digital flat panel X-ray detector models confirming performance settings and PASS results across sixteen test items.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Submitted technical documentation material to confirm product performance and safety for domestic regulatory review.
keyPoints: The report covers medical image acquisition device models G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, and G1717FWP.
Revision history lists Rev. 3 issued on 2026.04.14 due to product component upgrades.
Testing was performed from 2025.11.14 to 2025.11.17 at H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yongin, Korea.

All summarized performance test items are marked PASS, including CsI deposition thickness, sensor type, scintillator, pixel pitch, effective pixel number, effective pixel area, sensitivity, MTF, DQE, limited resolution, energy range, A/D conversion, wireless standard, IP range, communication, and trigger mode.
The conclusion states that the medical image acquisition device performance setting values showed no abnormalities.

evidence.claim: The document is a performance test report.

evidence.claim: The manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The product is a medical image acquisition device digital flat panel X-ray detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product name 의료영상획득장치 Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The report purpose is to confirm performance of the medical image acquisition device G1417CW and seven other models.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 시험 성적서는 의료영상획득장치 (G1417CW 외 7종)의 성능 확인을 위한 시험성적서이다.

evidence.claim: Rev. 3 was issued on 2026.04.14 due to product component upgrades.
evidence.evidenceText: 3 2026.04.14 Revision due to product component upgrades
evidence.pageTarget: G Series Performance Test Report Revision History

evidence.claim: The write, review, and approval dates shown are 2026.04.14.
Testing occurred from 2025.11.14 to 2025.11.17.
Testing took place at H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yongin, Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: 시험장소: ㈜에이치앤아비즈 (경기도 용인시 처인구 처인성로41-16 2동 (우) 17118)

evidence.claim: CsI deposition thickness testing passed for 300μm type and 500μm type criteria.
evidence.evidenceText: 300μm type : 338.41μm 기준치 만족; 500μm type : 507.54μm 기준치 만족

evidence.claim: Sensor type testing passed for PIN-TFT and Flexible PIN-TFT types using a-Si and IGZO specifications.
evidence.evidenceText: PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) 사양서 확인 PASS; Flexible PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) PASS

evidence.claim: The scintillator specification is CsI and the scintillator check passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Scintillator 확인 CsI 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: The common pixel pitch criterion is 140μm ± 10% and the test passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 공통 Pixel pitch 140μm ± 10% 확인된 Pixel area를 Pixel number로 나눠 기준값 이내인지 확인. PASS

evidence.claim: Effective pixel number criteria passed for all listed model groups.
evidence.evidenceText: Effective Pixel Number 확인 2500 x 3052 pixels 이상 PASS; 3040 x 3040 pixels 이상 PASS; 3072 x 3072 pixels 이상 PASS

evidence.claim: Effective pixel area criteria passed for all listed model groups.
evidence.evidenceText: Effective Pixel Area 확인 350 x 427.3mm ± 10% 이내 PASS; 425.6 x 425.6mm ± 10% 이내; 430.1 x 430.1mm ± 10% 이내

evidence.claim: Sensitivity testing passed under RQA5 beam condition at 70kV, 4 to 64mAs, 21mm Al filter, SID 150cm.
evidence.evidenceText: RQA5 Beam condition, 70kV, 4 ~ 64mAs 21mm Al filter SID: 150cm PASS

evidence.claim: MTF testing passed under RQA5 beam condition at 70kV, 40mAs, 21mm Al filter, SID 150cm.
evidence.evidenceText: MTF Phantom 영상 이미지를 획득하여 Calibration 적용 후 ‘Final Test’ 프로그램을 사용한 측정값이 시험 기준을 만족하는지 확인한다. RQA5 Beam condition, 70kV, 40mAs 21mm Al filter SID: 150cm PASS

evidence.claim: DQE testing passed under RQA5 beam condition at 70kV, 40mAs, 21mm Al filter, SID 150cm.
evidence.evidenceText: DQE Bright 영상 이미지를 획득하여 Calibration 적용 후 ‘Final Test’ 프로그램을 사용한 측정값이 시험 기준을 만족하는지 확인한다. RQA5 Beam condition, 70kV, 40mAs 21mm Al filter SID: 150cm PASS

evidence.claim: Limited resolution criterion is Max 3.57 lp/mm and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Limited resolution Max 3.57 lp/mm 1 / Pixel pitch * 2 PASS

evidence.claim: Energy range testing confirmed normal operation at 40kvp and 150kvp for all listed models.
evidence.evidenceText: Energy range 40kvp, 150kvp 정상동작 40kvp / 150kvp로 조사 시 영상 획득되는지 확인. PASS

evidence.claim: A/D conversion uses 16bit ROIC data and converts to 14bit by removing the lower 2 bits.
evidence.evidenceText: ROIC 보드의 A/D 변환 해상도는 16bit이며, 하위 2비트를 제거하여 14bit로 변환하여 사용하는 방식임.

evidence.claim: The wireless standard criterion is IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac and passed based on Wi-Fi module specification review.
evidence.evidenceText: Wireless standard IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac Wifi 모듈 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: The IP range criterion is IP68 according to IEC 60529 and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: IP Range IP68 IEC 60529에 따른다 PASS

evidence.claim: Communication criterion is 1Giga-bit Ethernet and passed based on specification review.
evidence.evidenceText: Communication 1Giga-bit Ethernet 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Line trigger mode and Auto trigger mode both passed normal operation checks.
evidence.evidenceText: Trigger mode Line trigger 모드 정상동작 PASS Auto trigger 모드 정상동작 PASS

evidence.claim: The conclusion states that the medical image acquisition device performance setting values had no abnormalities.
evidence.evidenceText: 해당 시험 결과를 통해 의료영상획득장치 (모델명: HnX-R1, G series)의 성능 설정 값에 이상 없음을 확인하였다.
evidence.pageTarget: G Series Performance Test Report Conclusion

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is only indicated by source metadata as MFDS/domestic; the source text itself does not explicitly name MFDS.
Product identity is potentially ambiguous because the model list covers G1417/G1717 models, while the conclusion refers to 모델명: HnX-R1, G series.
MTF criteria appear inconsistent: summary text for one model group includes @ 0.1lp/mm, while detailed result tables for that group list 0.5lp/mm.
OCR or source text quality issues are present, including 'Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector', 'DATASHHET', and skipped numbering in the A/D conversion method.
